# Thyroid Medications (thyroid_medications)

**11 rules.** Category: endocrine

| canonical_id | db | severity | evidence | alert_headline | mechanism |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `acetyl_l_carnitine` | ingredient_quality_map | caution | probable | May affect thyroid medication | ALCAR antagonises thyroid hormone nuclear receptor entry, potentially reducing the efficacy of levothyroxine replacement. TSH may rise despite adequate levothyroxine dosing. |
| `bacopa` | ingredient_quality_map | caution | theoretical | May affect thyroid medication | Bacopa may increase endogenous thyroid hormone levels, potentially altering the equilibrium maintained by levothyroxine replacement therapy and requiring dose adjustment. |
| `calcium` | ingredient_quality_map | caution | probable | May affect thyroid medication | Calcium forms insoluble chelate complexes with levothyroxine in the gastrointestinal tract, reducing oral absorption by 20–25%. Effect is dose-dependent and clinically significant… |
| `chromium` | ingredient_quality_map | caution | probable | May affect thyroid medication | Chromium picolinate can reduce levothyroxine absorption when taken concurrently. Divalent chromium binds to thyroid hormone molecules in the gastrointestinal tract. |
| `fiber` | ingredient_quality_map | caution | probable | May affect thyroid medication | High dietary fiber intake adsorbs levothyroxine in the gut, reducing absorption. Psyllium and other supplemental fibers taken simultaneously with thyroid medication can significan… |
| `genistein` | ingredient_quality_map | caution | probable | May affect thyroid medication | Soy isoflavones can inhibit levothyroxine absorption when taken simultaneously and may independently suppress thyroid hormone synthesis via TPO inhibition, requiring dose adjustme… |
| `iodine` | ingredient_quality_map | monitor | probable | May affect thyroid medication | High iodine intake can alter thyroid physiology and therapy response. |
| `iron` | ingredient_quality_map | caution | probable | May affect thyroid medication | Ferrous sulfate and other iron salts form stable insoluble complexes with levothyroxine, reducing thyroid hormone absorption. Concurrent ingestion can significantly impair replace… |
| `l_tyrosine` | ingredient_quality_map | caution | theoretical | May affect thyroid medication | L-tyrosine provides substrate for thyroid hormone synthesis. Supplemental loading could theoretically alter thyroid hormone production, affecting the dose balance required for sta… |
| `magnesium` | ingredient_quality_map | caution | probable | May affect thyroid medication | Divalent magnesium cations can bind levothyroxine and impair gastrointestinal absorption, similar to other divalent mineral-levothyroxine chelation interactions. |
| `zinc` | ingredient_quality_map | caution | probable | May affect thyroid medication | Zinc chelation reduces levothyroxine absorption. Zinc is also required for thyroid hormone synthesis; deficiency can cause hypothyroidism, creating a complex bidirectional relatio… |
